top_signals.title: Oil prices fall nearly 4% after U.S. Energy secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lebanese president appeals to Israeli government to pursue talks, not war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Lebanese president appeals to Israeli government to pursue talks, not war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Sinks 4% as Chipmakers Sell Off Again: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rotation that has seen investors bail from richly priced technology names in favor of more economically sensitive industries resumed, dragging down the S&P 500 while lifting the majority of its companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apollo’s Shutterfly Sweetens Debt as Investors Weigh AI Risk
top_signals.summary: Shutterfly has sweetened terms on a portion of a critical debt refinancing, in a bid to assuage investors spooked by potential AI disruption and widening losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Private Equity Founder Constantino Ran Firm in ‘Drunken Haze,’ Ex-COO Says
top_signals.summary: On a Dominican Republic vacation five years ago, private equity boss Matthew Constantino almost died.

top_signals.title: Zodia Custody secures Luxembourg payment institution license to expand EU stablecoin services

top_signals.title: The regional differences in gasoline prices this Memorial Day
top_signals.summary: Against the backdrop of a nationwide increase in gasoline prices, regional dynamics including local supply and demand conditions, state fuel specifications, and state taxes influence the different prices drivers see at the pump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.
